reasoning: We are currently in April 2026, and looking back at the events of 2025, there was no deployment of the "Coalition of the Willing" to Ukraine. Widespread reporting indicates that a formal declaration of intent to deploy troops (contingent on a future peace deal or ceasefire) was only signed by the UK and France later on January 6, 2026. Prior to this, throughout late 2025, reports only detailed plans and commitments to deploy troops *after* the war ends or a ceasefire is reached. As of December 2025, statements from leaders only confirmed that they had "prepared plans" for deployment, not that any deployment had actually occurred in 2025. Therefore, the coalition did not deploy forces to Ukraine on or before December 31, 2025.
